calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-20-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of two Minors.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Petitioners: Doanh Viet Tran and Phuong Minh Nguyen, are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Dung Phuong Thi Tran and Anh Phuong Thi Tran, were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minors to: Julia Tran and Angela Tran.
Decree signed in open court.
